description: CompositionGreen striped kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, round neck, split side hem, and has a buttoned chest placket with layered decoration and hakoba stitch detailingFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this green kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with its stylised bib, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
